scripts.build: tsc && npm run build:demo && npm run build:kanban && npm run build:color && npm run build:grid && npm run build:annotate && npm run build:pairwise && npm run build:datafilter && npm run build:quiz && npm run build:planreview && npm run build:codereview-review && npm run build:diffmerge
scripts.build:demo: SKILL=demo vite build && mv skills/demo-skill/dist/demo.html skills/demo-skill/dist/index.html
scripts.build:kanban: SKILL=kanban vite build && mv skills/kanban-skill/dist/kanban.html skills/kanban-skill/dist/index.html
scripts.build:color: SKILL=color vite build && mv skills/color-skill/dist/color.html skills/color-skill/dist/index.html
scripts.build:grid: SKILL=grid vite build && mv skills/grid-skill/dist/grid.html skills/grid-skill/dist/index.html
scripts.build:annotate: SKILL=annotate vite build && mv skills/annotate-skill/dist/annotate.html skills/annotate-skill/dist/index.html
scripts.build:pairwise: SKILL=pairwise vite build && mv skills/pairwise-skill/dist/pairwise.html skills/pairwise-skill/dist/index.html
scripts.build:quiz: SKILL=quiz vite build && mv skills/quiz-skill/dist/quiz.html skills/quiz-skill/dist/index.html
